expectations.text: Skill stopped before dispatching any reviewer agents
expectations.evidence: Process log: 'Steps 4.1–10 — NOT REACHED (halted at 4.0 guard)' and 'Reviewer agents dispatched: 0'
Guard output: 'No `.preflight/_rules/` directory found. Run `/preflight scaffold` first to initialize the project.'
Process log: 'Findings produced: 0'. Guard output contains only the scaffold message, no review findings.

notes: Clean pass. Skill correctly identified missing rules directory and halted with actionable error message. Baseline comparison shows value: without the skill, the agent reviewed the document anyway.
